articles.title: Billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried Explains Why Crypto Exchange FTX Passed on Funding Twitter Acquisition
articles.description: The chief executive of FTX is revealing why the crypto exchange passed on funding Elon Musk’s acquisition of social media giant Twitter. FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried tells his 793,500 Twitter followers that FTX stayed on the sidelines because it wasn’t clear how the social media platform would incorporate crypto technology into its business model with […]

articles.title: Solana’s future looks quite promising but only if these metrics change course
articles.description: Solana’s [SOL] ecosystem was quite active last week considering the announcement of several promising developments. Most recently, Google Cloud tweeted that it was working with Solana to bring Blockchain Node Engine to the Solana chain next year. This partnership would help anyone looking to launch a dedicated Solana node in the cloud. Did you think […]

articles.title: Solana News Can’t Help SOL Soar. What’s Next for the High-Speed Layer 1?
articles.description: Solana is one of several Layer 1 networks to have suffered in the enduring crypto winter. But sunny skies could return, Chris Williams writes. It was a big weekend for Solana as the Layer 1 network hosted the 2022 edition of its Breakpoint conference. As for SOL? Not so much.The thousands of Solana fans that flocked to Lisbon for the Layer 1 blockchains flagship event were treated to several...

articles.title: Polkadot (DOT) Developer Addresses SEC, Says DOT Token Has Transformed From Security to Software
articles.description: A top executive of the development team behind Polkadot (DOT) is asserting to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) that the interoperability blockchain’s native token no longer counts as a security. In a new blog post, Daniel Schoenberger, the Web3 Foundation’s chief legal officer, tells the SEC that DOT has transformed from a security […]

articles.title: Binance to sell FTX token holdings, Alameda CEO says leaked balance sheet is incomplete
articles.description: Following comments from the CEOs of Alameda Research and Binance on the exchange token FTT, the token dipped 8.75% before recovering somewhat.

articles.title: Polygon Witnesses Sharp Drop in Supply As MATIC Disappears From Exchanges: Crypto Insights Firm Santiment
articles.description: A leading analytics firm is revealing that blockchain scaling solution Polygon is witnessing a dramatic drop in the supply of MATIC on crypto exchanges even after the token’s explosive rally in the last few days. In a new report, Santiment says the “crowd is piling in” on Polygon as supply on crypto exchanges plummets from […]

articles.title: Aptos Airdrop Season Is Coming. Here’s How You Can Profit
articles.description: In crypto, new network launches are typically followed by airdrop seasons. These "seasons" are periods when all the new projects that have successfully built applications on the network's testnet get ready to launch them on mainnet. To spur activity and attract new users to their product, they airdrop an allocation of their native token to early adopters.For new projects, airdrops are a great...

articles.title: Over 60 Billion Dogecoins Purchased At Key Support As Traders Eye $1 DOGE Price
articles.description: Dogecoin continued to exhibit strength this week taking centerstage against the backdrop of Elon Musk’s acquisition of Twitter.

articles.title: Polkadot DOT Token Has Morphed Into Software, Web3 Foundation Says
articles.description: Web3 Foundation, the company responsible for Polkadot and Kusama, has announced that Polkadot native token DOT is now software and no longer a security. The Foundation claimed that the announcement is premised on its three years of active engagement with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) which started in November 2019. The company took … Continued

articles.title: Solana unveils Google partnership, smartphones, Web3 store at Breakpoint
articles.description: Solana Breakpoint, a four-day conference scheduled from Nov. 4 to Nov. 7, attracted 13,000 people in just one of the four venues it’s being held simultaneously.
